chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.S-67 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.185/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12-5-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 28-4-2025, following order was passed:- “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Under the circumstances, this petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however in the interest of justice adjourned to 12.05.2025.” Today is the same position none present on behalf of the petitioner, nor has any intimation been received. However, perusal of record reflects that for the same relief, the petitioner has already approached the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Khairpur by filing Crl. Misc. Application No.536 of 2024, which was allowed in his favour vide order dated 16-03-2024, but in spite of that this petition has been filed for the same relief, which being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E Naveed Ali
